_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data subject rights management, including rights request intake, fulfillment workflows, response timelines, and documentation requirements.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Knowledge SP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-005 (SP, cosine: 0.504), SP-K-010 (SP, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.531). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, requirements]. NICE-only terms [user] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, documentation, fulfillment, intake, management, request] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.930, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.068 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of user requirements" and "Knowledge of data subject rights management, including rights request intake, fu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.505 ≈ STS 0.531 (gap 0.026). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, requirements] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, requirements]. NICE-only: [user]. WIDAI-only: [data, documentation, fulfillment, intake, management, request].
